CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-11-2004 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE FILE FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES; THEREFORE, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by LaVon Granger. (212)
